Event: The Pharaoh Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SL19
Orb's Soul 'Eternal Vessel'

Once in a while, the unit casts improved restoration on 3 random allied units. It removes 3 random negative effects from them, and they recover 40% health. All their stats are also increased by 25% for 4 sec. If they have less than 40% health when improved restoration is applied, they gain a shield that absorbs 50% of any damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: The Pharaoh Treasure Hunt

Event date: 05/09/2025

Sage bot code: SL19

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 5 secs
